outlook.summary: Market is tightly pinned near the 730 Call Wall. Positive total GEX across 0DTE, Weekly, and Monthly expiries indicates a highly stable environment. Heavy put support at 710 and 700 anchors the downside, while 730 caps the immediate upside.

market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are temporary resistance (breakout likely). Put walls are strong support. Gamma flip acts as dynamic support.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility expected due to heavily positive Total GEX across all expiries, leading to structural price pinning.
outlook.summary: Dealers are heavily long gamma, which suppresses volatility and creates strong magnetic price pinning. The market is trapped between the massive 690 Call Wall directly overhead and structural support at 680. Intraday price action will likely oscillate within this tight band unless spot breaks below the Weekly Gamma Flip at 677.

levels.motivazione: Resonance level: Massive Call OI and extreme volume in 0DTE (70k+), with heavy OI in WEEKLY and MONTHLY. Acts as a strict intraday and structural ceiling.
Resonance level: Dominant Put OI in 0DTE (15k+) combined with heavy Call/Put structures in WEEKLY and MONTHLY expiries. Primary structural support.
Confluence level: Highest Call OI in WEEKLY (28k) and major Call/Put anchor in MONTHLY. Acts as a strong gravitational pull if 680 breaks.
Confluence level: Significant Call OI in WEEKLY and MONTHLY, reinforced by bearish smirk skew. Secondary resistance level.
Confluence level: Massive Put OI in WEEKLY and highest combined Call/Put OI in MONTHLY. Deep structural support backed by bearish sentiment.
Single Expiry: Weekly Gamma Flip level. Shifts dealer positioning from long gamma to short gamma, amplifying downward volatility if breached.
